headline: D.R. Horton (DHI) Among the Most Undervalued High Quality Stocks To Buy Now
summary: ​D.R. Horton, Inc. (NYSE:DHI) currently trades at a forward price to earnings ratio of 13.51, which is below the sector median of 15.35.
